articles.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
articles.content: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.
articles.titleZh: 美国提供1000万美元用于获取Signal和WhatsApp黑客狂欢背后的团队信息
articles.contentZh: 至少自3月以来，两个俄罗斯国家集团的行动一直在进行。

articles.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
articles.content: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."
articles.titleZh: 杀死受Skiff影响的电子邮件应用程序的概念，因为大多数用户使用人工智能代理
articles.contentZh: 概念是“全力以赴使用代理来运行您的收件箱。”

articles.title: One-two punch delivered in global operation disrupts cybercrime "assembly line"
articles.content: "Operation Endgame" simultaneously disrupts two widely used crime tools.
articles.titleZh: 在全球运营中交付的两拳颠覆了网络犯罪“装配线”
articles.contentZh: “结局行动”同时扰乱了两种广泛使用的犯罪工具。

articles.title: White House drastically shortens deadline for dropping quantum-vulnerable crypto
articles.content: Order warns of national security risks if post-quantum cryptography isn't adopted in time.
articles.titleZh: 白宫大幅缩短放弃易受量子攻击的加密货币的截止日期
articles.contentZh: 如果未及时采用后量子加密技术，命令将警告国家安全风险。

articles.title: T-Mobile is booting customers from its oldest plans
articles.content: Earlier today, T-Mobile started notifying customers that it will be retiring many legacy plans and moving subscribers onto one of its current rate plans. This move includes plans that date back to the 3G era, and it's going about as well as you'd expect. Affected customers began sharing screenshots of the text on reddit and […]
articles.titleZh: T-Mobile正在从其最古老的计划中引导客户
articles.contentZh: 今天早些时候， T-Mobile开始通知客户，它将淘汰许多旧版套餐，并将用户转移到其当前的价格计划之一。此举包括可追溯到3G时代的计划，而且进展顺利。受影响的客户开始在reddit和[…]上分享文本的屏幕截图

articles.title: After a great start, DC’s new cinematic universe is already slowing down
articles.content: While Kara Zor-El's appearance at the end of James Gunn's Superman was a very pleasant surprise, Warner Bros. Discovery's plan to fast-track a standalone Supergirl feature always felt a little dubious. It seemed odd that, after Superman, the studio wanted to flesh out its new cinematic universe with films about another Kryptonian and one of […]
articles.titleZh: 在经历了一个良好的开端之后， DC的新电影世界已经开始放缓
articles.contentZh: 虽然Kara Zor-El在詹姆斯·冈恩的《超人》结尾的出现是一个非常令人愉快的惊喜，但华纳兄弟发现计划快速追踪一个独立的超级女郎角色的计划总是让人感到有点怀疑。奇怪的是，在《超人》之后，该工作室想用另一部氪星电影和一部[…]电影充实其新的电影宇宙。
